summary: Applied two surgical exit-seam edits to align Chapter 5 timeline and carry object continuity into Chapter 6 without changing chapter beats.
edits: Changed Marisol's 1:22 a.m. text to Luis from 'tomorrow night' to 'tonight' to match the same-day noon text and evening meeting timeline.
Specified that the redacted set is carried in Sonia's reinforced envelope to match the Chapter 6 opening image of Marisol holding an envelope of Red Hook copies.
